text: The robotic arms are used to dissect the hernia sac within the intra-abdominal cavity. The hernia defect is exposed and sized, followed by closure of the defect using robotic instruments.

The surgeon places an adequately sized mesh into the intra-abdominal cavity and secures it to the abdominal wall with a center stitch. Transfascial sutures and circumferential tacks are then used to further secure the mesh in place.
